meta.entry_logic: First trading day of month M, expiry = 3rd Friday of M+1 (~45 DTE)
meta.mid_logic: Closest trading day to expiry-21d (~21 DTE remaining)
meta.put_format: Each put has entry:{bid,ask,mid,iv,spot} and mid:{...} snapshots
meta.note: Engine interpolates linearly between nearest strikes at each snapshot.
